## 1) Change Summary (what + why, Required) | 变更摘要（改了什么 + 为什么改，必填）

<!-- In 1-5 bullets, include key changes, motivation, and expected outcome. 用 1-5 条同时说明关键改动、改动动机与预期收益。 -->
- 

## 2) Traceability Links (Required) | 追溯链接（必填）

<!-- Fill links based on PR type. Use N/A for non-applicable items. 按 PR 类型填写，不适用请写 N/A。 -->
- Feature requirement doc(s) | Feature 需求文档链接:
- Feature ticket / task / issue | Feature 工单 / 任务 / Issue:
- Bug ticket / incident / issue | Bug 工单 / 故障单 / Issue:

## 3) Scenario Details (Required) | 场景化信息（必填）

<!-- Fill the relevant scenario section below. 仅填写对应场景分区。 -->

### A. Feature / Enhancement section

#### Context & objective (Optional) | 背景与目的（选填）

<!-- Optional. Add details when links are not enough (e.g., business background, requirement details, cross-team constraints, legacy constraints, notable risks). 选填：当链接不足以表达上下文时补充（如业务背景、需求细节、跨团队约束、历史包袱、显著风险）。 -->
- Background / requirement / objective (Optional) | 背景 / 需求 / 目的（选填）:
- 

#### Acceptance criteria mapping (Optional) | 验收标准映射（选填）

- AC1:
- AC2:

#### Solution summary | 方案摘要

<!-- Feature required: prefer linking design/decision docs, then briefly describe approach and key trade-offs; if no doc, explain why. Feature 必填：优先附设计文档/决策记录链接，并简述方案与关键权衡；如无文档请说明原因。 -->
- Design doc / decision record link(s) | 设计文档 / 决策记录链接:
- Brief approach & trade-offs | 方案简述与关键权衡:

### B. Bugfix section

<!-- Fill this section when this PR is Bugfix. Bug 修复类 PR 填写本节。 -->

#### Bug symptom & reproduction (Required for Bugfix) | 缺陷现象与复现（Bugfix 必填）
- Symptom(s) | 现象:
- Repro steps | 复现步骤:
- Affected scope | 影响范围:

#### Root cause & investigation (Required for Bugfix) | 根因与排查过程（Bugfix 必填）
<!-- Strict required by team policy for bugfix PRs. 团队策略：Bugfix 严格必填。 -->
- Root cause | 根因:
- How investigated | 排查方式:

#### Fix strategy (Required for Bugfix) | 修复策略（Bugfix 必填）
<!-- Keep this concise. Summarize the fix and why it works; reference above if already explained. 保持简洁：简述修复方案及其生效原因；如上文已说明可引用。 -->
- Fix strategy summary | 修复方案简述:

## 4) Impact & Risk Assessment (Required) | 影响范围与风险评估（必填）

<!-- Focus on scope and risk only. Emphasize user/business/technical impact and mitigation. 仅关注影响范围与风险，重点说明对用户/业务/技术的影响及缓解措施。 -->
- Impact scope | 影响范围:
- Main risks | 主要风险:
- Mitigation / rollback | 缓解措施 / 回滚方案:
- Reviewer focus (Optional) | 评审关注点（选填）:

## 5) Test Evidence | 测试结果与证据

<!-- Keep this section concise: provide either evidence links/artifacts OR a brief test method/result summary. 本节保持精简：测试证据链接/产物 与 测试方式结果简述，二选一即可。 -->
- Evidence link(s) / artifact(s) (Optional) | 证据链接 / 测试产物（选填）:
- Test method & result summary (Optional) | 测试方式与结果简述（选填）:
